title: Refactor NotificationSender cross-function nil cleanup
prompt: Refactor the entire module MyApp.NotificationSender from test_fixtures/defensive_nil_pipeline.ex. Consistent philosophy: every function should pattern-match on the input shape in its head — no `if is_nil` anywhere, no `&&` nil-punning, no `== nil` comparisons. `send_welcome/1` entry point returns `{:error, :no_user}` / `{:error, :no_email}` / `Mailer.send/2` result. `build_template/1` returns a template string, dispatching to `default_template/1` or `custom_template/2` based on map shape. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.NotificationSender do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Four functions to clean consistently. Requires holding the refactor philosophy across all of them.
